ogTitle: Kilaben Bay vs Kilgra: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Kilaben Bay and Kilgra.
heading: Kilaben Bay vs Kilgra — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Kilaben Bay, New South Wales and Kilgra, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Kilgra has a lower overall climate risk score (36/100) compared to Kilaben Bay (39/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Kilaben Bay or Kilgra safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Kilaben Bay has a flood risk score of 50/100, while Kilgra scores 51/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Kilaben Bay scores 53/100 for bushfire risk. Kilgra scores 20/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Kilaben Bay or Kilgra?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Kilgra has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.4% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
